settings.blurb: Our #1 seller. A high-protein chicken recipe built for growing kittens, hypoallergenic, gentle on tummies, and irresistible from the very first bowl.

settings.name: Farhana R.
settings.text: My Persian is the fussiest eater alive and she cleared the bowl in one sitting. Coat looks glossier after three weeks too.

settings.name: Rakib H.
settings.text: Ordered the Prostar 15 kg for my three cats. Great value, fast delivery, and they're thriving on it.

settings.name: Nusrat J.
settings.text: The Choosy Salmon is magic. My cat rejected everything for a week and demolished this. The 'she finally ate it' bag.
